meaning: adj.驴的,象驴一样的,愚蠢的
examples: He sells soya bean asinine tie on a tree.
I must have been insane to listen to your asinine gibberish!
Then they do something asinine, get in trouble and begin the downward slope out of fame into notoriety.
His students thought he was acting, being dramatic about an asinine comment just made by a boy in the back row.
